Item.Text: [P3020]BMS Loss Of Communication in Private CAN
[P33D5]Current Sensor out of Upper/Lower Range Diagnosis
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level oor / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: 3B_64_#03_Number of times where AVCC NG occurs during a life
RoutineEntryStatus
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Data.Name: 21_01_#45_bit4_bit5_Interlock Status sent by CAN(regarding CAN data about interlock "interlock battery")
21_61_#16_Sum of kWh from beginning of Battery life
140C_AD value of Sensor Power Supply Voltage
141C Cell Voltage No.1 of Failure Module
141D Cell Voltage No.2 of Failure Module
141E Cell Voltage No.3 of Failure Module
141F Cell Voltage No.4 of Failure Module
1420 Cell Voltage No.5 of Failure Module
1421 Cell Voltage No.6 of Failure Module
1422 Cell Voltage No.7 of Failure Module
1423 Cell Voltage No.8 of Failure Module

21_61_#16_Sum of kWh from beginning of Battery life
21_61_#16_Sum of kWh from beginning of Battery life
3B_64_#03_Number of times where AVCC NG occurs during a life

Test.Description: Over Current in Charge or Discharge
The maximum temperature of pack is Under -5°C
Bus Bar OverHeating - Check bolt inter module
BMS Mute (BUS Off) / Loss of Communication with BCB or PEB
RAM in Salve or Master Diagnosis
ROM in Salve or Master Diagnosis
EEPROM in Salve or Master Diagnosis
ALU in Slave or Master Diagnosis
Aux Battery out of range <9V or >17.5V
Pack Over Voltage LV2 (VPack > 60.2V in Charge Mode or >61.6V in Normal Mode)
Pack Over Voltage LV2 (VPack > 58.8V in Charge Mode or >60.2V in Normal Mode)
The Battery State Of Health Power is Under 40%

Device.Name: [P33D5]Current Sensor out of Upper/Lower Range Diagnosis

Test.Description: The maximum temperature of pack is over 54°C
The maximum temperature of pack is over 58°C
The difference between maximum V and minimum V of cells > 200mV

Device.Name: [P3020]BMS Loss Of Communication in Private CAN

Test.Description: Loss of com BMS private CAN Network
The maximum voltage of cell is under: 2.5V@ 10degC or 2.3V@ 0degC
The maximum voltage of cell is under: 2V / Need Reprog

Display.DataName: 21_01_#45_bit4_bit5_Interlock Status sent by CAN(regarding CAN data about interlock "interlock battery")
